title: Tropical Trek
description: Hop across floating islands in a lush tropical sea. Collect starfruit, avoid falling fronds, and discover hidden cave shortcuts.
merchHook: Island Hopper plush with vine-swing, trek-key keychain, island sticker pack, and jumper tee.

title: Surfside Sprint
description: Sprint along a sun-soaked beach boardwalk. Slide under cabanas, vault over sandcastles, and surf on rolling waves for speed bursts.
merchHook: Surf Runner plush with running surfboard, sprint-key keychain, boardwalk sticker pack, and runner tee.

title: Parrot Passage
description: Tap to guide a parrot through a canopy of tropical fruit. Dodge mango swarms and ride thermal updrafts for high-flying combos.
merchHook: Parrot Flyer plush with rainbow wings, feather keychain, canopy sticker pack, and flyer tee.

title: Crab Pot Clatter
description: Whack hermit crabs as they peek out of coconut shells. Hit the golden crab for bonus points but avoid the spiky urchins that pinch your score.
merchHook: Pincer Whacker plush with crab-mallet, pot-key keychain, shell sticker pack, and whacker tee.

title: Tiki Torch Tray
description: Serve tropical drinks to island guests lounging on the beach. Match the right fruit garnish to each order before the sun sets.
merchHook: Tiki Server plush with tray accessory, torch-key keychain, tropical-drink sticker pack, and server tee.

title: Wave Paddle
description: Volley a glowing surfball across a lagoon court. Each rally builds wave energy — first to seven points claims the high-tide trophy.
merchHook: Wave Rider plush with paddle accessory, surfball keychain, lagoon sticker pack, and paddle tee.

title: Mangrove Maze
description: Guide a mangrove serpent through twisting tidal channels. Eat glow-fish to grow longer and avoid your own coils in the narrowing waterways.
merchHook: Mangrove Serpent plush with segmented body, glow-fish keychain, tidal sticker pack, and serpent tee.

title: Volcano Escape
description: Navigate a maze of volcanic tunnels as lava rises. Collect obsidian gems to unlock shortcuts and reach the summit before the molten tide.
merchHook: Lava Leaper plush with glow-lava veins, obsidian keychain, volcano sticker pack, and leaper tee.
